title: Exit Whisper Role Work
summary: Reusable wrkstrm-finance workstream template for exit guidance, simulation, and governed execution hooks.
instructions: Use this template when instantiating concrete Exit Whisper work.
Keep exit recommendations advisory unless broker receipts or governance overrides prove execution.
Do not treat this reusable template as evidence that an exit action happened.
outcomes: Exit guidance is strategy-aware, simulation-backed, and governance-gated.
Realized P/L context is returned to the trade journal when execution is proved.

tasks.text: P/L journal writes with entity segregation.
Profit capture and trailing stop strategies; broker hooks.
Autonomous exit engine with human-in-the-loop overrides and governance logs.
